base: v24/v20 design with bundled audio, Dari engine changed from HTMLAudioElement to Web Audio API
diagnosis: v24 used HTMLAudioElement.play() later in an automatic sequence.
Mobile browsers can block programmatic media playback unless the audio system is unlocked by a user gesture.
v25 unlocks a Web Audio AudioContext directly from Play/Test taps, then plays bundled MP3 buffers through that running context.
This removes mobile Web Speech and remote audio from the Dari path.
